Title: Gaming PC
Notes: Root cause identified as severe dust buildup and degraded thermal compound causing CPU overheating and automatic shutdown. System was cleaned, CPU cooler re-seated, and new thermal paste applied. CPU temperatures are now stable (~60–62 °C under idle/BIOS). System is operating within safe thermal limits.
